---
title: "About"
image: assets/duck-with-knife.webp
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/narang99
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nhariom/
html:
  include-in-header:
    text: |
      <style>
        div.quarto-title h1.title {display: none};
      </style>
---

I'm Hariom Narang, a software engineer from Bangalore, India. I used to work at [qure.ai](https://www.qure.ai), leading the XRay processing team. Stuff that I've particularly enjoyed working with before includes working on a lot of developer productivity challenges arising from a huge monorepo housing computer vision models and optimising inference performance.  
Currently on a career break, trying my hand at neural network interpretability.   


Feel free to reach out at <span class="email">hariom.2711@gmail.com</span>

---

PS: Why the duck? I kinda just find them funny and cute, I don't have a pet or anything, but ducks as memojis are the best.
